parameters.sqlQuery:
WITH client_max AS (
  SELECT client_id, MAX(date_start) AS max_date
  FROM `oneeighty-warehouse.raw.raw_meta_campaign_insights`
  WHERE date_start >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 24 MONTH)
  GROUP BY client_id
)
SELECT
  c.client_id,
  c.slug,
  c.currency,
  CAST(cm.max_date AS STRING) AS max_date
FROM `oneeighty-warehouse.ref.clients` c
LEFT JOIN client_max cm ON cm.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE c.status = 'active' AND c.has_meta = TRUE
